title: thrixspermum xantholeucum
intro: Thrixspermum xantholeucum, also known as the Yellow-White Dendrobium, is an orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Thrixspermum xantholeucum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and other conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used as an ingredient in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
